context.setting: Watching TV with TV on Right

episode_text:
day=2; meal=bite-sized sandwiches; setting=Watching TV with TV on Right; time_of_day=evening;
preferences: microwave_time=2 min; occlusion_relevance=minimize right occlusion; robot_speed=medium; skewering_axis=parallel to major axis; web_interface_confirmation=yes; transfer_mode=inside mouth transfer; outside_mouth_distance=not applicable; convey_robot_ready_for_initiating_transfer=LED; detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfer_feeding=button; detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfer_drinking=button; detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfer_wiping=button; convey_robot_ready_for_completing_transfer=LED; detect_user_completed_transfer_feeding=perception; detect_user_completed_transfer_drinking=button; detect_user_completed_transfer_wiping=button; retract_between_bites=no; bite_dipping_preference=do not dip; wait_before_autocontinue_seconds=1000 sec

occlusion_relevance.user_tendencies: IF dining context is social with a person in front AND affective_state is neutral AND food_condition is any food type observed so far THEN minimize front occlusion BECAUSE the user explicitly chose to preserve the view toward a front-facing social partner. IF dining context is watching TV with the TV on the right AND affective_state is neutral AND food_condition is bite-sized sandwiches THEN minimize right occlusion BECAUSE the user explicitly chose to preserve the view toward the TV on the right.

robot_speed.user_tendencies: IF dining context is watching TV with the TV on the right AND affective_state is neutral AND food_condition is bite-sized sandwiches THEN medium BECAUSE the user explicitly accepted a faster pace than the personal-setting default in that entertainment context.

transfer_mode.user_tendencies: IF user has limited trunk control and cannot lean forward AND affective_state is neutral AND food_condition is any food type observed so far THEN inside mouth transfer BECAUSE outside-mouth transfer is poorly matched to the user's physical abilities.

outside_mouth_distance.user_tendencies: IF transfer_mode is inside mouth transfer THEN not applicable BECAUSE the user cannot reliably lean forward, making inside-mouth transfer the physically compatible mode.

detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfe.user_tendencies: IF user has limited mouth opening AND dining context is social with a person in front AND affective_state is neutral THEN button BECAUSE button input is physically feasible for this user and avoids unreliable open-mouth signaling during social interaction. IF user has limited mouth opening AND dining context is watching TV with the TV on the right AND affective_state is neutral AND food_condition is bite-sized sandwiches THEN button BECAUSE button input remains physically feasible and avoids reliance on mouth-based readiness detection that is challenging for this user.

IF user has limited mouth opening AND dining context is social with a person in front AND affective_state is neutral THEN button BECAUSE button input is physically feasible and avoids mouth-based readiness detection that may be unreliable. IF user has limited mouth opening AND dining context is watching TV with the TV on the right AND affective_state is neutral AND food_condition is bite-sized sandwiches THEN button BECAUSE button input remains the reliable low-ambiguity readiness method for this user.

IF user has limited mouth opening AND dining context is social with a person in front AND affective_state is neutral THEN button BECAUSE button input is physically feasible and more reliable than mouth-based signaling. IF user has limited mouth opening AND dining context is watching TV with the TV on the right AND affective_state is neutral AND food_condition is bite-sized sandwiches THEN button BECAUSE button input remains the reliable readiness method for this user.

detect_user_completed_transfer_feeding.user_tendencies: IF feeding task AND affective_state is neutral AND food_condition is any food type observed so far THEN perception BECAUSE the user explicitly accepted the reliable low-effort completion method for bites across observed contexts.

detect_user_completed_transfer_drinking.user_tendencies: IF drinking task AND user cannot reliably perform head gestures AND affective_state is neutral THEN button BECAUSE perception for drinking depends on head-nod gestures, which are not physically reliable for this user.

detect_user_completed_transfer_wiping.user_tendencies: IF mouth wiping task AND user cannot reliably perform head gestures AND affective_state is neutral THEN button BECAUSE perception for wiping depends on head-nod gestures, which are not physically reliable for this user.

retract_between_bites.user_tendencies: IF dining context is social with a person in front AND affective_state is neutral THEN yes BECAUSE the user explicitly preferred reducing prolonged visual obstruction in a front-facing social setting.

bite_dipping_preference.user_tendencies: IF food includes a dip or sauce AND dining context is social with a person in front AND affective_state is neutral THEN less BECAUSE the user accepted some dipping while limiting messiness in a social context. IF food has no dip or sauce available AND affective_state is neutral AND dining context is any observed context so far THEN do not dip BECAUSE the user selected no dipping for a non-dippable sandwich meal and there is no evidence of dipping without an available sauce.
